Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgement For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgement For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor J.C.G.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:17:46 p.m. and concluding at 2:22:11 p.m.

Plaintiff J.C.G represented by Roger Bresnahan, Esq. (Admitted PHV).
Guardian ad Litem L.A.G. appearing represented by Roger Bresnahan, Esq. (Admitted PHV), is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Airbnb not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents explanation of work done on this case, as it relates to it's request for attorney's fees as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.
The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $150,000.00 minus the following:

1. $37,500.00 for Attorney's Fees
2. $138.89 for Costs

Balance of settlement in the sum of $112,361.11 shall be used to purchase an annuity with Allstate Insurance Company (Allstate) by way of Non-Qualified Assignment Funding Agreement (NQAFA).

The Plaintiff is authorized and directed to execute all documents reasonably necessary to carry out the terms of the settlement.

Proposed Orders Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability signed and filed this date. (D505)
